summary: Repair two aggregate regressions found after M4 work: invalidate the cached WASM engine probe on an explicit retry, and update the localization contract test to follow the extracted bounds-label formatter.

decisions.decision: An explicit browser WASM retry invalidates only the current engine/path cache entry before starting the next probe; ordinary probes remain deduplicated.
decisions.rationale: The aggregate test exposed a real stale-null cache hit that made Retry inert. Narrow invalidation preserves normal cache behavior and lets a retry observe newly available assets.

decisions.decision: The unit-localization contract follows the extracted viewer-bounds-label formatter and also asserts that ViewerPane delegates to it.
decisions.rationale: The product already centralized the dimensions message call in the helper; the prior direct-source assertion was stale and did not reflect runtime ownership.

testEvidence.criterion: The two failures from the one aggregate suite are resolved without weakening behavior.
testEvidence.test: Run both formerly failing focused files after the bounded product/test repairs.

red.outcome: RED: 162 files ran; 1,243 passed and 2 failed. WASM retry called engine.version once instead of twice; localization test expected a dimensions call in ViewerPane after extraction to viewer-bounds-label.ts.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/app/App.wasm-engine.test.tsx tests/ui/message-catalog-units.test.ts
green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 2 passed (2); Tests 5 passed (5); Duration 2.35s.

testEvidence.criterion: The regression repairs remain type-safe and source-policy clean.
testEvidence.test: Run TypeScript and repository lint/source policy once after the bounded fixes.

red.outcome: RED: aggregate verification was not green before the cache and localization repairs.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; pnpm.cmd lint
green.outcome: GREEN: TypeScript exited 0; Checked 424 files in 219ms with source policy passed.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
